Draft a Lattix ADR.

Use this format:
# ADR-<id>: <Title>

## Context
1–2 paragraphs.

## Decision
What changed and why.

## Alternatives
Brief A/B comparison.

## Consequences
Tradeoffs, risks, operational impact, follow-ups.

## Rollout/Rollback
How to ship safely and revert or roll forward.

Keep it concise. Do not invent facts; use TODO markers for unknowns.
